quotes.text: If it's Friday, there must be Clam
quotes.author: Chowder.

quotes.text: You're not going to take that out - not if you
quotes.author: want a very mad pregnant woman on your hands...

quotes.text: Ben: Hey, guys... doescalataikadongle?
quotes.author: John and Gryph: Huh?

quotes.text: I only get my dongle before lunch,
quotes.author: then it goes away.

quotes.text: Sounds like everyone is suffering from
quotes.author: the Cindy Brady syndrome.

quotes.text: Cool Cube!
quotes.author: -- Everyone refering to Christee's

quotes.text: I can paint realistic people, I just
quotes.author: can't paint cracks!

quotes.text: Hey, I've got kind of an impractical,
quotes.author: cumbersome idea...

quotes.text: Whenever I try to talk to her, her head
quotes.author: turns into a big black hole

quotes.text: Sheri: Phil, have you seen Ben's tool?
quotes.author: Drew:	Yeah, and you should see the demo.

quotes.text: Ahh! It's an SGI. I'm afraid of it!
quotes.author: -- Leslie (and others)

quotes.text: My code is flawless!  I was just trying to
quotes.author: solve the wrong problem.

quotes.text: You just can't polish a turd...
quotes.author: -- Wayne's response while reviewing

quotes.text: Its not a bug - that's just the way it works...
quotes.author: -- Wayne, concerning an 'undocumented feature'

quotes.text: Our previous game was VD, this game is SCK as
quotes.author: in SICK, and our next game is STD. What's up

quotes.text: Sometimes I really wonder who Drew is
quotes.author: channelling for....

quotes.text: I would rather sit here and get soggy.
quotes.author: -- Harley, comparing the virtues of going inside

quotes.text: Condense fact from the vapor of nuance
quotes.author: -- On John's to-do list

quotes.text: Josh, put the ear back...
quotes.author: -- Wayne

quotes.text: Yuck! That feels like being licked by an earthworm!
quotes.author: -- Wayne, on StickyHands

quotes.text: I hate computers.  I just hate them.
quotes.author: -- Gryph, having a bad code day.

quotes.text: Drew, you do the perfect jitter!
quotes.author: -- Maida

quotes.text: That must be it. Space aliens abducted my data.
quotes.author: -- Gryph, while having yet another mysteriously

quotes.text: A man who can do a nice sharp spit... it's kinda
quotes.author: sexy, really.

quotes.text: Leslie: You told us that?
quotes.author: Gryph : I did! You never listen to me... boo hoo...

quotes.text: For the first time I woke up without my head.
quotes.author: -- Maida, not quite finishing a thought

quotes.text: Spegs lives in the cemetary.
quotes.author: -- Sheri, explaining file placement

quotes.text: It's Our Lady of Bugalupe
quotes.author: -- Maida, explaining the candle on her monitor.

quotes.text: You're not an idiot.  You just have nice soft
quotes.author: pants on.

quotes.text: I feel like I've married my Dad.
quotes.author: -- Leslie

quotes.text: I want to get Mrs. Flowers alone...
quotes.author: -- T. Ray

quotes.text: I can't drive in these eyes.
